title: ‘Dropped 2,000-pound bombs’: US launches B-2 bombers to dismantle Iran’s missile production capabilities
summary_full: The US is intensifying its campaign against Iran's missile capabilities, with B-2 bombers reportedly striking deeply buried missile sites. The move signals a direct effort to dismantle Iran's missile production, a program long viewed with suspicion by Washington. The strikes highlight the US's ability to target hardened infrastructure, even underground facilities.
